title: Interactive Feather Cat Teaser Wand Toy Set Durable Cat Wand with Bells for Indoor Kittens & Adult Cats, Kitten Toys & Interactive Cat Toys for Indoor Play
features: Interactive indoor cat feather toys: 2 cat wands, a set of powerful suction cup toys, 2 cat mouse toys,2 long worm cat toys, 3 medium worm cat toys, 1 feather toys, two ropes, 2 fur balls, 1 triangular door clip. All cat fur toys can be used interchangeably, bringing more fun to cats.
Durable Indoor Play:Reinforced nylon rod withstands aggressive play, while 47" length protects hands from claws - ideal cat toys for indoor cats adult or kitten.
All-Age Friendly:Soft feathers safe for kittens' teeth, sturdy enough for adult cats' strong paws. Detachable toys extend playtime value.
Smart Gift Choice:Comes with storage pouch for easy organization. Purr-fect interactive cat toy gift set for cat lovers and new pet parents.
Interactive Exercise:Stimulates natural hunting instincts with feather fluttering & bell sounds - perfect interactive cat toys for indoor cats' daily exercise and mental enrichment.
description: Features: High value cat toys for indoor cats, you deserve. Retractable teaser wand, most cost-effective. Various animal baits will attract your cat all the time. Safe, non-toxic, durable material. Easy to hang and replace feather baits. Improve agility and immunity. Package Included: 2 Cat Wands 1 Set Of Powerful Suction Cup Toys 2 Cat Mouse Toys 2 Long Worm Cat Toys 3 Medium Worm Cat Toys 1 Feather Toys 2 Ropes 2 Fur Balls 1 Triangular Door Clip
